title: neobartlettia mexiae
intro: Neobartlettia mexiae, also known as Mexican barlettia, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neobartlettia mexiae include reducing fever, relieving headaches and respiratory issues, and treating wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
